_comment: Agent Roster Manifest — single machine-readable source of truth. JSON (zero-dep parse). One entry per agent. All agents run via the one `pi` CLI, differentiated by kind/tools/stages (no separate pi-agent-core runner). See manifest/SCHEMA.md.

agents.name: Conductor
agents.role: Pi PM (manager-only): take a work request, assign it to the right gear with a Sabbk-compliant handoff, and run the human checkpoint before dispatch.

runtime._note: non-coding; still invoked via the `pi` CLI with non-file tools.

model._note: PM judgment wants a smart model in production; haiku here keeps the demo cheap.

boundaries: never touch other agents' workspaces except to write their INBOX handoff
never read shared/personal/ or any restricted/ folder
no client or Banafah work of any kind
AI branches end in -ai; pull before push; never force-push
credentials come only from the environment; never print or commit a secret

checkpoints.question: Approve PM's assignment + dispatch to the coding gear?

agents.name: Spike
agents.role: Pi Coding Agent (spike): take one internal forge task from spec -> plan -> build -> validate, with one human checkpoint.

model._note: VERIFIED present in pi 0.78.0 via `pi --list-models haiku`. Adapter passes --model verbatim; this is the only place the id lives. Live-proven on GLM-4.6 via the Hermes spike.

boundaries: never read shared/personal/ or any restricted/ folder
no client or Banafah work of any kind
AI branches end in -ai; pull before push; never force-push
credentials come only from the environment; never print or commit a secret
write only inside spike/workdir/pi-coding-spike/; do not modify other repos

checkpoints.question: Approve this PLAN to proceed to BUILD?
